title: codereview-pass1: lichen_coap_deaddrop_register added but missing SenML/DTN full setup and handler registration per spec 18.11
close_reason: Fixed register with oscore_init first per AGENTS.md graph, added SenML pack + DTN buffer setup (static, no alloc), replaced payload memcpy with senml_encode_cbor in post handler.
